svg.aria-label: Research-based weekly digest cover: Android 129 CVEs Qualcomm Zero-Day, VMware Aria KEV, DevSecOps 87pct vulnerable orgs
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-03-07: Android 129 CVEs (CVE-2026-21385), VMware Aria KEV (CVE-2026-22719), DevSecOps 87% vulnerable

g.text: Memory corruption in display driver - 234 chipsets affected - Commercial spyware targeting
CVSS 7.8 - Patch level 2026-03-05 required - MDM policy enforcement recommended
CVE-2026-22719 CISA KEV Listed Unauthenticated RCE
Arbitrary command execution without authentication - Virtualization infrastructure at risk
Patch immediately - Restrict network access - Audit privilege escalation paths
Datadog Report - Production Vulns - 278-Day Dependency Lag
87% orgs have exploitable vulns in prod - VoidLink K8s malware - CI/CD token leaks
Shorten patch SLA - Automate vuln scanning - Harden container runtime detection
